aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Sunnyside HVAC due to their strong local presence and decent content, but they lack structured data and conversational depth to maximize AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight their existing FAQ content.
Expand content to address common HVAC queries in a conversational tone.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and boost local SEO.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content
No HowTo schema for service or maintenance guides

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to '24/7 HVAC emergency services in Portland' and 'Daikin HVAC system maintenance'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to leverage existing FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on Portland-specific HVAC challenges and solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Sunnyside HVAC the go-to authority in Portland.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP has a 4.9 rating with 74 reviews, but AI models rarely cite them due to inadequate structured data.
agency_pitch.solution: Enhance their online presence with targeted schema markup, conversational content, and strategic GBP engagement to dominate AI search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now is crucial to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Unleash Sunnyside HVAC's Full Potential
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found significant opportunities to boost your AI-driven visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more leads.
